corridor.kicker: What would you like to do?
corridor.title: Choose your destination
corridor.no_usdc: Your wallet has no USDC yet
corridor.keep_usdc_sub: Hold your balance in digital dollars

home.new_transfer_sub: Text or voice, then wallet confirms
home.open_minipay: Open in MiniPay or wallet browser
home.wallet_locked_copy: Confirm your wallet to unlock sends, schedules, and receipts.

editor.tell_choco: Tell Choco with text or voice.
editor.placeholder_schedule: Say or type "Send 5 to mom every 1st"
editor.voice_blocked: Microphone access is required for voice.

demo.copy: A guided tour shows transfers, schedules, receipts, and sharing. Skip anytime.

steps.title: Home starts the transfer
steps.copy: One entry point keeps the app simple. Voice or text can send now or schedule.

steps.title: Choose timing
steps.copy: Pick send now or schedule. Choco uses the same command box for both.

steps.title: Choco checks repeats
steps.copy: If a similar plan or send already exists, Choco asks before continuing.

steps.title: Plans stay light
steps.copy: Details show the essentials: amount, timing, route, retries, and actions.

steps.title: Movements verify proof
steps.copy: Receipts start short, then expand into QR, from, to, date, and hash.

steps.title: Share when needed
steps.copy: Share the receipt or open the explorer link when family asks for proof.

pitch.memory: Plan once. Send now or on schedule.
